recordUpdates.name: UpdateopptoQuoteUnderwritingfailed

start.filterFormula: AND( OR( NOT({!$User.Bypass_Workflow__c}), {!$User.Id} = CASESAFEID ({!$Label.SmartIDFCreatedbyId}) ), NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.IDFUniqueUserID__c})), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.IDF_Status__c}))), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.Subsidiary__c}))), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Subsidiary__c}, "Belgium"), {!$User.Id} = CASESAFEID ({!$Label.SmartIDFCreatedbyId}) )
